items.prompt:
Use case: identity-preserve
Asset type: Offshore Wind Masters P01 full-body Source Art correction v002
Input image: edit target and strict identity, costume, PPE, tool, pose, palette, lighting and composition reference
Primary request: preserve the approved adult woman character exactly and correct only the offshore wind-turbine background engineering.
Character invariants: keep the same face, expression, hairstyle, helmet, amber-and-graphite PPE, gloves, boots, body proportions, stance, ultrasonic probe, composite blade sample, hand positions and cinematic semi-realistic anime rendering. Do not redesign or replace the character.
Scene/backdrop: rebuild the background with only a few clearly readable conventional modern offshore three-bladed horizontal-axis wind turbines. Every complete rotor has exactly three smooth tapered blades connected to one centered hub, evenly spaced 120 degrees apart. Blade roots, taper, length, continuous curvature, hub, nacelle, tower, foundation, ladder and access platform must be structurally plausible and consistent in scale and perspective. Omit any turbine that would be heavily cropped or occluded.
Composition/framing: vertical 2:3, one full-body character, head and boots visible, 12 percent safe zone.
Constraints: change only the technically incorrect wind turbines and immediately surrounding background geometry; preserve all approved character details. Source art only, no frame, text, letters, numbers, logo, watermark, HUD or UI.
Avoid: two-bladed, four-bladed or five-bladed wind turbine; extra, missing, duplicate, fused, branching, forked, bent, kinked, warped, twisted, melted, broken, floating or detached blade; uneven blade spacing; off-center hub; malformed blade root; blade intersecting another blade, hub, nacelle, tower, platform or character; duplicate nacelle; split or leaning tower; impossible foundation, ladder, platform, scale or perspective; male, child, minor, sexualized character, revealing PPE, pin-up pose.

Use case: identity-preserve
Asset type: Offshore Wind Masters P01 full-body Source Art correction v002
Input image: edit target and strict identity, costume, PPE, tool, pose, palette and lighting reference
Primary request: preserve the approved adult woman wind-turbine mechanical technician and correct the canvas ratio plus all offshore wind-turbine engineering geometry.
Character invariants: keep the same face, expression, hairstyle, helmet, orange-red offshore PPE, harness, gloves, boots, body proportions, stance, torque wrench, diagnostic device, cables and cinematic semi-realistic anime rendering. Do not redesign or replace the character.
Scene/backdrop: rebuild the background with only a few clearly readable conventional modern offshore three-bladed horizontal-axis wind turbines. Every complete rotor has exactly three smooth tapered blades connected to one centered hub, evenly spaced 120 degrees apart. Blade roots, taper, length, continuous curvature, hub, nacelle, tower, foundation, ladder and access platform must be structurally plausible and consistent in scale and perspective. Keep rotors separated from the character; omit any turbine that would be heavily cropped or occluded.
Composition/framing: recompose to strict vertical 2:3, one full-body character, head-to-boots visible, face, hands, tools and feet inside a 12 percent safe zone.
Constraints: preserve the character and equipment while changing only framing and technically incorrect turbine/background geometry. Source art only, no frame, text, letters, numbers, logo, watermark, HUD or UI.
Avoid: tall 1:2 canvas; cropped head, hands, tools or boots; two-bladed, four-bladed or five-bladed wind turbine; extra, missing, duplicate, fused, branching, forked, bent, kinked, warped, twisted, melted, broken, floating or detached blade; uneven blade spacing; off-center hub; malformed blade root; blade intersecting another blade, hub, nacelle, tower, platform or character; duplicate nacelle; split or leaning tower; impossible foundation, ladder, platform, scale or perspective; male, child, minor, sexualized character, revealing PPE, pin-up pose.
